finding_results.notes: Scene-two confession now uses a single callback to the prior April ledger and then escalates with a new 14-day live-anomaly compliance condition tied to father asset freeze risk and Suyon-lane exposure.
The abstract thematic wrap-up was replaced with concrete in-scene pressure: camera tracking, a trailing sedan, and an audible direct check-in call at dawn.

Rewrote the two flagged exchanges to separate idiolect under pressure: Ina now self-corrects explicitly in-line (qualifier drop and reset), while Minjae responds in concrete operational terms (transfer failure, route freeze, burn-word protocol). Removed mirrored metaphor pairing and reduced polished aphoristic symmetry.

Replaced the repeated sensory scaffold with varied openings (body-pressure, tactile-action, and object-impact phrasing). None of the three cited beats now uses the exact construction 'She could feel'.

Reduced scar motif repetition in the intimacy block to two mentions total (lines 187 and 211). Each remaining mention triggers a distinct relational shift: exposure/pain recognition at line 187 and consent-trust recalibration at line 211; redundant mentions at lines 161 and 231 were replaced with new tactile cues.

pass_summaries.summary: Resolved both structural/craft findings by replacing second-scene recap with a new causal stake and ending on a concrete external threat while preserving chapter continuity and heading contract.

Revised targeted dialogue to restore voice separation and pressure-true cadence: Ina's stressed analytic self-revision now contrasts with Minjae's logistics-grounded framing in both flagged exchanges, with contractions and colloquial pressure preserved.
Completed chapter_07 prose/copyedit fixes by removing repeated sensory sentence scaffolding and tightening scar-image reuse while preserving voice, scene pressure, and continuity constraints.
